# web

```go
import "github.com/hoangharry-tm/zerotrust/internal/output/web"
```

Package web implements the live HTML dashboard renderer for ZeroTrust.sh.

WebRenderer starts a local HTTP server, prints the URL to stdout, and fans pipeline events to connected browsers via Server\-Sent Events \(SSE\). The browser receives HTML fragments and inserts them directly via the native EventSource API — no external framework required.

Output \(stdout\):

```
open → http://localhost:54321
```

The server listens on a random free port and shuts down cleanly after the pipeline signals EventDone or the scan context is cancelled.
